inputs.label: Source Hour (0-23)
inputs.businessContext: Hour component of the source time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hour component of the source time.

inputs.label: Source Minutes (0-59)
inputs.businessContext: Minute component of the source time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minute component of the source time.

inputs.label: Source UTC Offset Hours
inputs.businessContext: Hour offset of source timezone from UTC (e.g., -5 for EST).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hour offset of source timezone from UTC (e.g., -5 for EST).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak saat diliminin UTC'den saat farkı (örneğin, EST için -5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenoffset der Quellzeitzone von UTC (z. B. -5 für EST).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage horaire du fuseau source par rapport à UTC (ex. : -5 pour EST).

inputs.label: Source UTC Offset Minutes
inputs.businessContext: Additional minute offset of source timezone from UTC.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional minute offset of source timezone from UTC.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak saat diliminin UTC'den ek dakika farkı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Minutenoffset der Quellzeitzone von UTC.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Minutes supplémentaires de décalage du fuseau source par rapport à UTC.

inputs.label: Target UTC Offset Hours
inputs.businessContext: Hour offset of target timezone from UTC (e.g., 3 for EAT).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hour offset of target timezone from UTC (e.g., 3 for EAT).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef saat diliminin UTC'den saat farkı (örneğin, EAT için 3).
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenoffset der Zielzeitzone von UTC (z. B. 3 für EAT).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage horaire du fuseau cible par rapport à UTC (ex. : 3 pour EAT).

inputs.label: Target UTC Offset Minutes
inputs.businessContext: Additional minute offset of target timezone from UTC.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional minute offset of target timezone from UTC.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef saat diliminin UTC'den ek dakika farkı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Minutenoffset der Zielzeitzone von UTC.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Minutes supplémentaires de décalage du fuseau cible par rapport à UTC.
